picks.rationale: SOL leads the rally with +19.30% 1M and +13.86% 1W gains, driven by a short squeeze and protocol upgrades; weekly gain of 18.6% is the strongest among majors per [coindesk.com](https://www.coindesk.com/markets/2026/07/03/ether-and-solana-extend-gains-as-a-short-squeeze-lifts-bitcoin-toward-usd62-000).

ETH surged +11.25% 1W and +1.92% 1D, with positive news sentiment of 0.327; it led short liquidations at $157M and is up ~10% on the week per [coindesk.com](https://www.coindesk.com/markets/2026/07/03/ether-and-solana-extend-gains-as-a-short-squeeze-lifts-bitcoin-toward-usd62-000).
KAITO shows explosive momentum with +30.44% 1M and +12.67% 1W, plus +19.75% YTD, making it the top momentum asset in the AI category.
XLM surged +18.68% 1W and +2.87% 1D, with a positive +3% YTD, benefiting from the broader market short squeeze and positive payment-sector sentiment.
NMR has strong 1M momentum of +22.08% and +7.34% 1W, with a flat YTD; it is a small-cap AI token benefiting from the AI narrative recovery.
ALT gained +10.83% 1W and +2.48% 1D, with +1.54% 1M, showing strong short-term momentum as a small-cap AI token riding the market bounce.

BTC holds above $62K with +3.55% 1W and +1.45% 1D, supported by whale accumulation of $16.7B and first ETF inflow in over a week at $224M per [theblock.co](https://www.theblock.co/post/407131/markets-find-their-footing-bitcoin-holds-61000-rebound-ahead-of-us-independence-day-as-soft-jobs-data-eases-rate-fears).
drivers: soft jobs data eases rate fears

picks.rationale: LINK gained +7.57% 1W and +1.60% 1D, with positive news sentiment of 0.274, benefiting from the Robinhood blockchain announcement and infrastructure demand.

XRP rose +8.04% 1W and +3.59% 1D, with trading volume topping Bitcoin on Upbit; weekly gain of 5.7% per [coindesk.com](https://www.coindesk.com/markets/2026/07/03/ether-and-solana-extend-gains-as-a-short-squeeze-lifts-bitcoin-toward-usd62-000).

TAO is nearly flat on the week (-0.01%) but has strong YTD resilience at -2.55% and a $2.36B market cap; AI tokens are showing signs of recovery per [fxstreet.com](https://www.fxstreet.com/cryptocurrencies/news/crypto-bulls-on-firmer-footing-as-us-rate-hike-risk-recedes-202607031130).

previous_picks.rationale: SOL leads the rally with +17.19% weekly gain, +3.47% daily, and a positive news sentiment of 0.099, boosted by the Securitize NYSE listing and a short squeeze that liquidated $281M in bearish bets.

ETH surged +10.17% weekly and +5.63% daily, leading the short squeeze with $157M in liquidated shorts, despite negative news sentiment -0.164; weak jobs data and $221M BTC ETF inflows support risk-on rotation.
BTC rallied to $61.6K (+2.91% weekly, +2.05% daily) as $221M ETF inflows ended a 10-day outflow streak, with positive news sentiment 0.104 and a short squeeze backdrop.
KAITO shows exceptional momentum with +25.37% monthly and +18.40% weekly gains, despite a -4.72% daily pullback; YTD +13.57% and small $0.14B market cap offer high beta upside.
LINK gained +7.95% weekly and +4.21% daily with the highest news sentiment in the universe at 0.274, supported by Robinhood's blockchain rollout and infrastructure narrative.
XRP rose +6.56% weekly and +4.24% daily with strong news sentiment 0.169, benefiting from the broad short squeeze and weak jobs data, though CLARITY Act delay caps upside.
ADA surged +15.24% weekly and +6.90% daily, the strongest daily gain among L1s, with positive news sentiment 0.056, though YTD -50.31% remains a concern.
TAO gained +4.73% daily and +0.93% weekly, with YTD -2.16% showing relative resilience; AI narrative and $2.37B market cap provide a balanced risk-reward.
TRX is the only asset with positive YTD at +12.03% and the highest news sentiment 0.202, though weekly -0.96% and daily +0.97% show lagging momentum; sanctions news adds uncertainty.
NMR shows strong momentum with +14.24% monthly and +7.51% weekly gains, YTD +0.34%, but a -3.71% daily dip and tiny $0.072B market cap make it a high-risk, high-reward pick.
